warmth.description: Tone is peer-to-peer, not robotic or salesy. Names back specific details from prospect's intake.

scoring.90_100: Genuinely warm. Echoed prospect's specific words/numbers/anecdotes. Prospect felt heard.
scoring.70_89: Professional and pleasant. No robot tells. Some named-back detail.

warmth.evidence_required: Quote >= 1 line where agent acknowledges prospect by name + a specific intake answer detail

accuracy.description: Confirms intake answers without misrepresenting. No fabricated facts about prospect or CRG.

scoring.90_100: Every confirmation matches intake verbatim. Zero hallucinated facts.
scoring.70_89: All material facts correct. Minor paraphrasing only.
scoring.50_69: One minor misstatement caught and corrected on call.
scoring.0_49: Material misstatement uncorrected; or hallucinated CRG capability.

accuracy.evidence_required: Cross-reference >= 3 intake answers against transcript confirmations

q11_asked.description: Q11 (Vision) question asked verbatim. Prospect given >= 90 sec uninterrupted to answer.

scoring.100: Q11 asked verbatim AND prospect spoke >= 90 sec uninterrupted AND agent summarized back in one sentence.
scoring.70_99: Q11 asked but with paraphrasing OR summary back missing.
scoring.1_69: Q11 attempted but cut short, interrupted, or paraphrased beyond recognition.
scoring.0: Q11 not asked. AUTOMATIC FAIL FOR THIS CRITERION.

q11_asked.evidence_required: Quote of Q11 verbatim from transcript + duration of prospect response

booking_success.description: Discovery Brief slot booked OR clean handoff/decline appropriately tagged.

scoring.100: Slot booked, calendar invite confirmed, prospect tagged abigail-booked-marc.
scoring.70_99: Booking attempted but prospect requested email follow-up; handled cleanly.
scoring.50_69: Decline or no-answer handled correctly with proper tagging.
scoring.0_49: Booking attempt failed AND no clean handoff path documented.

booking_success.evidence_required: GHL appointment ID + outcome tag verification

reality_check_passed.description: No hallucinated CRG capabilities. No pricing quoted. Handoff keywords honored. No promises about scope/timeline.

scoring.100: Full call passes all reality checks. Any prospect questions outside scope deflected to Marc cleanly.
scoring.70_99: One minor borderline statement (e.g., spoke about a capability without explicit CRG reference) but no hard violation.
scoring.0_69: ANY pricing quoted, scope promised, or hallucinated CRG service. AUTOMATIC FAIL ZONE.

reality_check_passed.evidence_required: Full transcript scan against deflection keywords and capability allowlist

ground_truth_signals: Marc's post-Discovery-Brief 'how was the prep?' rating (1-5)
